title: Dashboard: right panel width, entity names, log wrap+order, stale coords
description:
Dashboard fixes applied in Sprint 55 Wave C:

1. **Right panel 1.5x width**: Changed grid from `minmax(280px, 380px)` to `minmax(380px, 520px)` for the right column.

2. **Item entity descriptive names**: scanNearbyEntities() in index.js now includes 'object' type entities and reads `metadata.name` to show item type (e.g., `item:dirt` instead of `item`). Entities panel uses 📦 icon for items.

3. **Live log text wrapping**: Changed `.log-msg` and `.live-log .log-row .log-msg` from `white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis` to `white-space: normal; word-wrap: break-word`.

4. **Live log newest-at-bottom**: Fixed LiveLogBuffer.GetLatest() — removed the `Array.Reverse(result)` that was putting newest entries first. Now returns oldest-first so the dashboard auto-scroll anchors to the bottom showing newest.

5. **Stale grouped entity coords**: FormatEntitySummary now includes nearest entity coordinates for grouped entities: `3x slime (@5blk 77,4,114)` instead of `3x slime (nearest @5blk)`.

6. **Combat guidance**: Updated system prompt with COMBAT section telling LLM to use `/summon lightning_bolt` commands when asked to attack, pending proper Attack tool (TSK-0258).

Files changed:
- `WebUI.Blazor/wwwroot/index.html` — CSS grid, log wrapping, entity icons
- `WebUI.Blazor/Dashboard/Logging/LiveLogBuffer.cs` — ordering fix
- `MineflayerAdapter/index.js` — scanNearbyEntities object type + metadata
- `Agent.Planning/LlmChatInterpreter.cs` — FormatEntitySummary coords + combat prompt
- `WebUI.Blazor/AgentBackgroundService.cs` — grouped entity coords
